questionHtml: Calculate the probability that, on a randomly selected day, Timmy makes a profit.
markschemeHtml:
* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.

X ~ N(820, 2302)       (M1)

Note: Award M1 for an attempt to use normal distribution. Accept labelled normal graph.

⇒P(X > 1000) = 0.217       A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the probability that, on a randomly selected day, Timmy makes a profit.
